rationale: For a reading and fanfiction library app, users need a calm, comfortable environment that reduces eye strain while evoking the tactile, cozy feeling of physical books and personal organization. Dark modes can feel too technical or clinical here, while bright neon is distracting.

layout_and_spacing.grid_library: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-6

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E8E6E1] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.card_default: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] rounded-xl transition-all duration-200
surfaces.card_interactive: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#E07A5F]/30
surfaces.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-[#E8E6E1] bg-[#FDFBF7] hover:bg-white hover:border-[#E07A5F] transition-colors rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-16

components.button_primary: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#D1684D] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]/50 focus:outline-none
components.button_secondary: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] text-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#F5F3EC] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
components.badge_fandom: bg-[#E5EBE6] text-[#3A5A40] border border-[#3A5A40]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
components.badge_original: bg-[#FDF3E1] text-[#B87A00] border border-[#B87A00]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

app_logo.description: Minimalist logo of an open book with leaves growing out, terracotta and dark green
app_logo.usage: Top left navbar, Auth page logo, Favicon inspiration

auth_hero_bg.description: Warm digital illustration of a cozy reading corner with a comfortable chair, sunlight, stacks of books.
auth_hero_bg.usage: Split screen background for the Auth/Login page

empty_state_books.usage: Empty state illustration when the library has no EPUBs yet

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have distinct hover states. Use transform -translate-y-1 for book cover cards.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade in on page load using framer-motion (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0).
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]/50) are visible on keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Lucide-React for all icons (Book, Library, UploadCloud, Download, Trash, Tag).
Use standard Tailwind classes as mapped in the typography and colors sections.
For the library view, books should use aspect ratio 2:3 for the cover images.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='upload-epub-button', data-testid='book-card-1').
Do NOT use transparent navigation headers; use the defined header surface style with backdrop-blur.
For Shadcn components, heavily customize to remove the default 'Vercel/Stripe' monochrome look. Inject the Organic Earthy palette (Terracotta/Forest Green).
